description: Add `contact` to the Alga PSA node resource selector.
Add a `contactOperation` selector with `create`, `get`, `list`, `update`, and `delete` values.
Update the node subtitle/description logic so contact operations render consistently with existing resource operations.
Add `Contact -> Create` required field handling for `full_name`.
Add `Contact -> Create` optional fields for `email`, `client_id`, `role`, `notes`, `is_inactive`, and `phone_numbers`.
Add `Contact -> Update` optional fields for `full_name`, `email`, `client_id`, `role`, `notes`, `is_inactive`, and `phone_numbers`.
Add `contactId` input handling for `Contact -> Get`, `Update`, and `Delete`.
Add `Contact -> List` pagination and filter inputs for `page`, `limit`, `client_id`, `search_term`, and `is_inactive`.
Reuse client lookup resourceLocator behavior with manual UUID fallback for contact `client_id` fields.
Add a contact create payload builder that maps the agreed core fields to the `/api/v1/contacts` API contract.
Add a contact update payload builder that sends only provided contact fields and omits empty values.
Add a contact list query builder for pagination and core filters.
Add `phone_numbers` parsing and validation helpers aligned with the contact API schema.
Implement `Contact -> Create` execution using `POST /api/v1/contacts`.
Implement `Contact -> Get` execution using `GET /api/v1/contacts/{id}`.
Implement `Contact -> List` execution using `GET /api/v1/contacts` and preserve pagination metadata in output.
Implement `Contact -> Update` execution using `PUT /api/v1/contacts/{id}`.
Implement `Contact -> Delete` execution using `DELETE /api/v1/contacts/{id}` and normalized delete success output.
Validate `contactId` as non-empty UUID before sending get, update, or delete requests.
Preserve existing success normalization behavior for contact CRUD responses and list outputs.
Preserve existing continue-on-fail behavior for contact CRUD operations with item-level error objects.
Extend node description/load-option tests to cover the contact resource and client lookup behavior.
Extend execute and helper tests to cover contact payloads, list behavior, ID validation, and `phone_numbers` validation.
Update package README to include contact operations, field expectations, and output behavior.
Add at least one example workflow that demonstrates the new contact resource.
Update package release notes and docs synchronization tests for the contact CRUD expansion.
